From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 11 Mar 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-03-11
Message-ID: <EyRnIibvR0mHgLqqciaySA@geopod-ismtpd-39>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="b694c57c2379e8b716764dd04cca9c62db71600a3770619384a3914a0521"

Hi there, Llama Peeps! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter! It
was a very big week for us last week, so have a ton to share!

🤩 The Highlights:

* LlamaCloud General Availability: In case you missed it: huge
news! LlamaCloud is now available for everyone to sign up. It’s
the core of our enterprise offering for agentic knowledge
management over unstructured data. Full announcement here! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..A4Ih1qCCq5l0w_2oYl4PLzU_CmPQDiaxiENVgdNQxX4 )

* Series A: We also announced our $19M series A funding
round! Hear from our investors 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.5-lxQRnMHXwjTAsOuvaWWfU8xiROKUDO140NCuTTvcU )
.

* Hugging Face Course on Building Agents: Our friends at
HuggingFace have created a comprehensive course covering the
components of LlamaIndex, RAG, tools, agents, and
workflows. Check it out! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..y2OItptIOO6mYnivX1W0dcohcJeqU5k4Ndeh9OSqKyA )

* DeepLearning Agentic Document Workflows Course: We’ve partnered
with DeepLearning.AI to offer a short course on integrating
agentic workflows into your software processes. Learn more here!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..usNBYn8NYSTblHZ3ofYZri6YvgDHPMi4MwRqdMDNHks )

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaParse Updates: Our Parse With Agent mode now supports
@AnthropicAI Claude Sonnet 3.7 and @google Gemini 2.0 Flash for
better table parsing and cross-page consistency. Sign up for
LlamaParse! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uDujQGTdVBlFCewvY8EGGK7VHW7X7jcw8y_MdnBgkE4 ) | Read more in our docs!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..cOswA_GW6ASHqaqcCijAl3U5MKK4gnowfHRNz5oh9cY )

* Templates for Task-Specific Agents: We’re curating templates
that help automate knowledge work with just a few lines of code.
Explore how to process slide decks, extract invoice items, review
contracts, and generate reports. View the repo! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HaeXrlLodkHseH64QF4LI3QQEJFFvF-7lidSC52AvR0 ) | Sign up for LlamaCloud! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..G1IGpUh9YsxMzekXeoAPG3WywDNnOyEO7l5bjblWq80 )

✨ Framework:

* Multilingual, Multimodal RAG System: Learn how to build a
powerful Retrieval-Augmented Generation system with LlamaIndex
and Qdrant that handles multiple languages and
modalities. Explore the guide! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..mMD9D0Gm9ufVyMDE99ILk2C9Nel3SGQkaVJDryMDpvo )

* Updated Anthropic Cookbook: We’ve expanded our cookbook to
include API setup, streaming support, multi-modal capabilities,
and more. Check it out! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..QboTkpQ3GFBl7Pul_hb7svvEGJghxyWJQ4mrbQO0hYQ )

✍️ Community:

* Real-Time Knowledge Graph Exploration: Check out the demo from
@yworks showcasing yFiles for visualizing knowledge graphs with
real-time updates and interactions. Read their blog! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..-zDchni5EEmk2puE8oEjoGph5aQS8Zw4BVLJL2SDB7E ) | View the repo! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RbAfUkZLgcDnPV-wswr2hdecT5M5WW8FKCVKRX0bbrU )

* Mistral OCR Benchmarking: RT @jerryjliu0 shares insights on
Mistral OCR and its performance in document processing. Read
more! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..A3gNsvHSl3JBIEzFuEd5xT3YmndoCfawUdwhkJKQpBA )

* Agentic Document Workflows Tutorial: A new course with
@DeepLearningAI on building agentic document workflows is now
available. Learn more! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..usNBYn8NYSTblHZ3ofYZri6YvgDHPMi4MwRqdMDNHks )

* Building a Workflow-Based Travel Planner: Follow RS Rohan's
tutorial on creating an advanced travel planner using
@llama_index. Watch the tutorial video! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9MYunymQKVZp6JUTkJj-grBbesibpzQxATLa1avzZP4 )  | Access the full repo! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0Ri-AcwiaDP0e5BVjLOQhinZgMbQXjd6zMtif0sITlQ )

* Enhancing autism care: CentralReach has created an AI-enhanced
Electronic Medical Record platform that helps doctors deliver
care more effectively. Read all about it 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tQdXgHLpTY5lANLx2MbTCenW_6D7tyLM2kwNaOvyLZY )

Stay tuned for more updates, and as always, feel free to get in
touch ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.v7OORnpr5O56Yz3u1EuBbUiX6tJ2_aFiTb-UVWyuwjA ) with us for any
questions or feedback!

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BVNtJkAomNtiX4INWydPYtUzuG9knBDs3bDiUr3Qqzc )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xPqMH0ilmQfVRilMnHyhJSBGkfM_-IMEeHNuv2SjyYI )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pV-215Ijd52AcccfmczrQnef4Fuox3KnQmVyXPXAqIg )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
